name: tenkacloud-simulator
description: Deterministic multi-cloud API simulator for the TenkaCloud problem catalog.
author: Susumu Tomita <oyster880@gmail.com>

scripts.clean: bun rimraf contracts/dist core/dist 'providers/*/dist' 'apps/*/dist' 'tools/*/dist' conformance/dist coverage
scripts.lint:text: bun textlint README.md SECURITY.md Plan.md docs/architecture/protocol.md docs/architecture/harness.md docs/architecture/quality-bar.md docs/design/2026-07-12-tenkacloud-simulator.md docs/adr/0007-event-sourced-provider-plugin-architecture.md docs/adr/0008-simulator-source-roots-and-gates.md docs/adr/0009-retire-generic-init-skill.md docs/adr/0010-pinned-multi-platform-oci-distribution.md docs/adr/0011-provider-neutral-clock-transitions.md docs/adr/0012-bounded-host-docker-workload-runner.md docs/adr/0013-strict-typecheck-for-root-scripts.md
